blog.title: Ostdeutsche Spediteure stehen unter Kostendruck — aber wodurch eigentlich?
blog.description: Ostdeutsche Spediteure erleben einen erheblichen Kostendruck unter anderem durch niedrigere Lohnkosten in osteuropäischen Nachbarländern. Interessanterweise, sind die Kostenunterschiede im Bereich von 10% und der eigentliche Kostendruck kommt aus einer anderen Richtung.

prevBlog.title: My take on a housing podcast: Rent vs. Buy Is Not One Decision
prevBlog.description: The podcast argument against buying a home is strongest for young mobile professionals, but much weaker once you distinguish between different households and the very different risks they face.

nextBlog.title: Building a Social Media Growth assistant for Under 50 Cents a Month
nextBlog.description: How I built a LangGraph-based social media assistant that generates, queues, and publishes posts to Mastodon and Bluesky — with human approval and a monthly cost of under 50 cents.

nftMetadata.prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A s...
nftMetadata.name: AI Generated Art #1780780027794
nftMetadata.description: AI generated artwork based on the prompt: "Friendly comic-style illustration, bright and optimistic colors, modern web-comic aesthetic. A small helpful AI assistant sits beside a blogger at a desk. The AI presents a stack of social media post drafts labeled "Draft 1", "Draft 2", "Draft 3". The blogger reviews them with a pen, approving some with green checkmarks and rejecting others with red crosses. On a monitor, a weekly publishing calendar shows scheduled posts. Cozy home-office atmosphere, clean desk, coffee mug, plants, soft daylight through a window. The AI looks helpful and collaborative rather than autonomous. No dystopian robots, no dark colors, no corporate stock-photo style. Professional but approachable."
